args:
set -eu
rg -n 'BUILD_PROFILE = build_profiles.resolve_build_profile' vllm/setup.py >/dev/null
rg -n 'test_default_profile_is_full|test_minimal_dev_profile_disables_optional_cuda_packs|test_targeted_profiles_select_only_requested_backend_targets|test_unknown_build_profile_raises' vllm/tests/test_build_profiles.py >/dev/null
rg -n 'supported_build_profiles|resolve_build_profile|profile_family' vllm/vllm/build_profiles.py >/dev/null
printf 'vllm-setup-profile-matrix\n'
